name: SP8192 Pass-Gated Recurrence + Easy-Chunk TTT + Late Loop Onset + Control-Int8 Packing
author: Artem Buldin
technique_summary: SP8192 + looped layers 3-5 + parallel residuals from L6 + pass-gated recurrence + easy-chunk legal TTT + loop onset sweep (best at step 2600) + control-int8 packing + GPTQ SDClip + Brotli
notes: Non-record submission. Best single-seed is 1.08065825, but the 3-seed mean 1.08119835 does not beat the current public SOTA mean.
